丹药：凡级，地级，天级，灵级，圣级，帝级，神级。
武器：普通铁器，玄器，地器，天器，灵器，圣器，帝器，神器。
神通：凡阶，玄阶，地阶，天阶，灵阶，圣阶，帝阶，神阶。
天材异宝：凡级，玄级，地级，天级，灵级（灵药）圣级，仙级，神级（仙灵之药）
这里是本文的一些境界丹药等等级的划分，希望大家喜欢！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696437407,"group_id":"7281726441706753060","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2832757571717262"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7281726441706753060","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.5353207e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25353,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7285436357589353274","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"依旧是单女主！
男主表面上性格活泼，风趣幽默，背地里冷酷无情杀伐果断！【无事罗修，出事修罗！】
女主表面性格冷淡，前期对男主无修为有些嫌弃，不过终究是还是爱着对方的，实际的内心是一个慢热的小女生，渴望得到男主的爱护，表面傲慢高冷，却对毫无修为的男主极为爱护！
是一种比较和谐的慢热爽文，希望大家喜欢！！！","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":30,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773989770013E0DF4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227285436357589353274%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227281726441706753060%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696276861,"group_id":"7281726441706753060","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人起笔，还望各位书友多多支持","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N39aiHXPwAyv2IwV9hOXxXrQutFTpgg9S3D+sU/3ZoCL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/95dab5caa0d841faaa5a4b1d2d188211~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533086&x-signature=KIvVoW0pMGw4UTScQ65W4PwBIbk%3D","user_id":"2832757571717262","user_name":"雁笔惊鸿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2832757571717262","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"},{"en_title":"is_book_forum_operator","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5d5c4e7be80ba156a2703698120ff4e4","icon_width":64,"icon_height":23}","intro":"{"title_name":"运营官","title_detail":"《玄幻：我，白天绔少，夜间修罗！》的书圈运营官是一个珍贵的头衔，授予兼具创作力与责任心的书友，肩负活跃书圈的使命！","title_id":"is_book_forum_operator","big_icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0151264e36a6375ece6f9471ed95de86","detail_url":"dragon1967://webview?url=https%3A%2F%2Freading.snssdk.com%2Fwap%2Fbook-operator.html"}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"运营官","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"#5BA1E1"}","zh_title":"运营官"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7281726441706753060","book_info":{"abstract":"【单女主】【白发修罗】【修罗系统】
    罗修母胎穿越玄幻世界。
    一出生便是满头白发，眸如血海，眉似血刃！肌肤如玉，天生修罗面相！
    15岁之时，更是觉醒了修罗系统！
    无需如常人那般修炼，只需不断的厮杀，系统自会将被杀之人的气血转化为修罗气血，强化自身！
    “叮：检测到宿主毫无根基，奖励基础修为天玄境。”
    “叮：系统配送修罗面具一张，面具一带，谁也不爱，唤醒心中炼狱修罗血脉，可形成修罗神域！”
    “叮：系统配送修罗魔剑！”
    “叮：系统配送修罗神铠！”
    “叮：系统配送修罗神戒！”
    满级神装出门的罗修，神挡杀神，佛挡杀佛，没有道理可言！
    自那以后，白天，他是一个无忧无虑的世家废物绔少，到了夜间，他便是冷酷无情的血色修罗，一剑血染千里！
    “摘下面具，我是罗修！”
    “戴上面具，我是修罗！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of08b9f51292540bfa53a7ebe88ebf264~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"代号白昼","author_id":"","book_id":"7281726441706753060","book_name":"帝国第一纨绔：开局天娇神女求娶","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1678人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7282336266748690985","read_count":"1678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"264853"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"107","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,单女主,架空,东方玄幻,1v1,无后宫,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/40286da9a43
